team.date_founded: Founded by the roving prospector crews of Pallas, who never stayed in one crater for long.
team.number_of_fans: Around 12 million, scattered and wandering like the club itself.
team.badge: A lone figure walking toward a distant asteroid horizon.
team.home_kit: Sand-tan and brown with a drifting-dune pattern.
team.history: Pallas Wanderers have no fixed identity and make a virtue of it — a balanced, adaptable side that shifts its approach to suit any opponent. Rootless and flexible, they are nobody's easy game.
team.club_culture: Restless, adaptable, and self-reliant. The Drifters belong to no one and adjust to everyone.
team.political_leaning: Belt free-prospector — fiercely independent and suspicious of all authority.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for upsetting sides that underestimate them
legends: Rove Castan — the versatile captain who played every position with distinction
achievements: Most tactically varied side in the belt

stadium.date_built: A modular, relocatable ground assembled on the Pallas surface.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the roving prospector guilds.
stadium.pitch_size: Standard, kept flexible to suit the shifting game plan.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for low gravity.
stadium.bio: The Drifter is a modest, modular ground with a transient feel — fitting for a club that prides itself on never being pinned down. Away teams rarely know which Pallas will turn up.

training_facility.date_built: A basic facility, deliberately lean and portable.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded modestly by the prospector guilds.
training_facility.bio: The Nomad Training Grounds drill versatility above all — every player learns multiple roles, so the Drifters can reshape themselves match to match.

manager.appearance: Lean and restless, never seems quite settled on the touchline.
manager.bio: Nomad Ferreira is a tactical pragmatist who builds adaptable sides with no fixed shape, shifting his Wanderers to exploit whatever an opponent fears. Flexibility is his whole creed.
manager.playing_history: A versatile utility player who filled every role in his career.
manager.playing_philosophy: Have no fixed plan they can prepare for. Read the match and become whatever beats them.
manager.culture: A wanderer who trusts only adaptability.
achievements: Built the belt's most flexible side

managing_staff.appearance: Wiry and watchful, tweaks the press between phases.
managing_staff.bio: Drift Macias drills the pressing systems that let the Wanderers switch their approach mid-match, the specialist behind the adaptability.
managing_staff.playing_history: A roving midfielder turned pressing coach.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Change the press, change the game. Never let them settle.

players.appearance: Calm and adaptable, a keeper for any plan.
players.bio: Nomad Petrov is the balanced keeper comfortable behind whatever shape the Drifters pick.

players.appearance: Tireless and versatile, fills any flank role.
players.bio: Stray Torres is the workhorse defender who adapts to whatever the match demands.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the flexible anchor.
players.bio: Roam Okafor is the team-first defender who shifts seamlessly between back-four and back-five.

players.appearance: Combative and willing, the bite at the back.
players.bio: Wander Kane is the aggressive defender who adds steel to the shifting structure.
Vagrant Lee is the composed defender who keeps the Drifters solid through every tactical shift.

players.appearance: Inventive and mobile, the creative chameleon.
players.bio: Trek Kim is the creative midfielder who reinvents his game to suit each plan.
achievements: Most chances created in the side

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the flexible engine.
players.bio: Journey Mori is the team-first midfielder who covers whatever gap the shifting shape leaves.

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, the steady pivot.
players.bio: Range Osei is the composed midfielder who anchors the Drifters through every change of plan.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.appearance: Lean and opportunistic, the adaptable finisher.
players.bio: Ramble Rivera is the selfish striker who finds goals in whatever system Ferreira builds.

players.appearance: Direct and willing, the flexible forward.
players.bio: Traverse Chen is the aggressive forward who fills whatever attacking role the plan needs.

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, the wide finisher.
players.bio: Pilgrim Patel is the selfish wide forward who provides the cutting edge in any shape.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Exile Beck is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Quest Park is the team-first deputy who slots into any defensive shape.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Odyssey Torres is the promising young defender learning the Drifters' versatile ways.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Venture Tanaka is the creative deputy who fits the flexible side from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Sojourn Brennan is the eager young finisher pushing for a place among the Wanderers.
